nasb.text: I am a joke to my friends, The one who called on God and He answered him; The just and blameless man is a joke.

esv.text: I am a laughingstock to my friends; I, who called to God and he answered me, a just and blameless man, am a laughingstock.

cnv.text: 我這求告　神，又蒙他應允的， 竟成為朋友的笑柄， 公義完全的人竟成為笑柄，

ccb.text: 我这求告上帝并蒙祂应允的人竟成了朋友的笑柄， 我这公义纯全的人竟成了笑柄。
